When:

{% endunless %} {% endfor %} {% else %} TBD {% endif %}

settings.text: Entry is limited to guests aged 23 and above. Thank you for your understanding.

settings.code: Get Your Tickets

Book Your Tickets

Seating is limited · Once tables are full, tickets close.

<style>
  /* --- FYXX / THE GREEN ROOM: VALENTINE x ROAST TICKET MODULE (WORKS ON WHITE BG) --- */

  :root{
    /* Event palette (match poster) */
    --event-red: #B21E25;        /* primary red */
    --event-red-deep: #7E1216;   /* shadow red */
    --event-cream: #F5F1E8;      /* paper/cream */
    --event-charcoal: #1A1A1A;   /* text */
    --event-border: rgba(26,26,26,0.12);
    --event-border-strong: rgba(26,26,26,0.18);
  }

  /* Container */
  .event-container{
    border: 1px solid var(--event-border) !important;
    border-radius: 22px !important;
    padding: 24px !important;
    margin: 28px 0 !important;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, rgba(245,241,232,0.45) 100%) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 14px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.14) !important;
    transition: transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  .event-container:hover{
    transform: translateY(-2px) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 18px 62px rgba(0,0,0,0.18) !important;
  }

  /* Title (lean serif like poster) */
  .event-container h3{
    font-size: 1.35rem !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
    color: var(--event-charcoal) !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em !important;
    font-family: "Playfair Display", "Didot", "Bodoni MT", "Times New Roman", serif !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    line-height: 1.15 !important;
  }

  /* Optional: a subtle red accent rule under title (non-invasive) */
  .event-container h3::after{
    content: "" !important;
    display: block !important;
    width: 74px !important;
    height: 3px !important;
    margin-top: 10px !important;
    border-radius: 999px !important;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--event-red) 0%, rgba(178,30,37,0.25) 100%) !important;
  }

  /* Table */
  .event-ticketing-table{
    width: 100% !important;
    border-collapse: separate !important;
    border-spacing: 0 !important;
    border-radius: 16px !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    background-color: #ffffff !important;
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(26,26,26,0.08) !important;
    margin-bottom: 1.35rem !important;
  }

  .event-ticketing-table th,
  .event-ticketing-table td{
    padding: 12px 14px !important;
    text-align: left !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,26,26,0.08) !important;
    font-size: 0.95rem !important;
    color: var(--event-charcoal) !important;
    font-family: "DM Sans", "Montserrat", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;
  }

  /* Header row: red like poster */
  .event-ticketing-table th{
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-size: 0.78rem !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em !important;
    color: var(--event-cream) !important;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--event-red) 0%, var(--event-red-deep) 100%) !important;
  }

  .event-ticketing-table tr:last-child td{
    border-bottom: none !important;
  }

  /* Dropdown */
  .ticket-select{
    border: 1px solid rgba(26,26,26,0.22) !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    padding: 9px 10px !important;
    background: #ffffff !important;
    font-size: 1rem !important;
    color: var(--event-charcoal) !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    cursor: pointer !important;
    transition: border-color .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease !important;
  }

  .ticket-select:hover{
    border-color: rgba(178,30,37,0.6) !important;
  }

  .ticket-select:focus{
    border-color: var(--event-red) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(178,30,37,0.18) !important;
    outline: none !important;
  }

  /* Button: red pill, premium */
  .ticket-checkout-button{
    display: inline-block !important;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--event-red) 0%, var(--event-red-deep) 100%) !important;
    color: var(--event-cream) !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    font-family: "DM Sans", "Montserrat", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em !important;
    padding: 14px 34px !important;
    border: none !important;
    border-radius: 999px !important;
    cursor: pointer !important;
    transition: transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease, filter .2s ease !important;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(178,30,37,0.35) !important;
  }

  .ticket-checkout-button:hover{
    transform: translateY(-2px) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(178,30,37,0.48) !important;
    filter: saturate(1.05) !important;
  }

  .ticket-checkout-button:active{
    transform: translateY(0px) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(178,30,37,0.35) !important;
  }

  /* Guest details form */
  .ticket-custom-questions-container{
    margin-top: 1.3rem !important;
  }

  .ticket-custom-questions-container > div{
    border: 1px solid rgba(26,26,26,0.12) !important;
    border-radius: 16px !important;
    padding: 20px !important;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(245,241,232,0.65) 0%, rgba(245,241,232,0.35) 100%) !important;
  }

  .ticket-custom-questions-container label{
    display: block !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    color: var(--event-charcoal) !important;
    margin-bottom: 6px !important;
    font-size: 0.9rem !important;
    font-family: "DM Sans", "Montserrat", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em !important;
  }

  .ticket-custom-questions-container input[type="text"],
  .ticket-custom-questions-container input[type="email"],
  .ticket-custom-questions-container input[type="number"],
  .ticket-custom-questions-container input[type="tel"]{
    width: 100% !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(26,26,26,0.22) !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    padding: 11px 12px !important;
    background: #ffffff !important;
    color: var(--event-charcoal) !important;
    font-size: 0.95rem !important;
    margin-bottom: 12px !important;
    transition: border-color .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease !important;
  }

  .ticket-custom-questions-container input:focus{
    border-color: var(--event-red) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(178,30,37,0.18) !important;
    outline: none !important;
  }

  /* Responsive */
  @media (max-width: 768px){
    .event-container{ padding: 20px !important; }
    .event-container h3{ font-size: 1.15rem !important; }
    .event-ticketing-table th,
    .event-ticketing-table td{
      font-size: 0.82rem !important;
      padding: 8px 10px !important;
    }
    .ticket-checkout-button{
      width: 100% !important;
      text-align: center !important;
      padding: 12px 0 !important;
    }
  }

  /* Curved table corners */
  .event-ticketing-table th:first-child{ border-top-left-radius: 16px !important; }
  .event-ticketing-table th:last-child{ border-top-right-radius: 16px !important; }
  .event-ticketing-table tr:last-child td:first-child{ border-bottom-left-radius: 16px !important; }
  .event-ticketing-table tr:last-child td:last-child{ border-bottom-right-radius: 16px !important; }
</style>

<script>
  // Re-label the default checkout element as a styled button (same behavior)
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.event-container h3 + * + * + *').forEach(el => {
      if (el.textContent && el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === 'check out') {
        el.outerHTML = '<button class="ticket-checkout-button">Get Tickets</button>';
      }
    });
  });
</script>

settings.title: Shipping information
settings.content:
Use collapsible tabs for more detailed information that will help customers make a purchasing decision.

Ex: Shipping and return policies, size guides, and other common questions.

settings.code:
This Friday - December 19

We’re serving mulled wine and roasting chestnuts all afternoon. Drop by, settle in, and let Fyxx take care of the rest. Warmth included.

Friday, December 19 - from 2:00 pm and onwards

Book Now
